name: AKIHIKO KADEMURA - KOMARI: HOMEBOUND
description:
TW: su!cide, d3ath, mental illnesses (not mentioned but it is in the bot's description so it might say it)

it's been four years since KORUMI passed from "su!cide". you have been visiting AKIHIKO, her little brother who became a hikikomori, but he hasn't answered yet. you decide to visit AKIHIKO again, and he actually...opens the door for you this time.

boy, does he look different...

THIS IS MY AU!!! MY CHARACTERS!!! ASK ME FIRST BEFORE MAKING ANY BOTS OF MY STUFF!!!
